name: cs348-backend-engineer
description: Owns Flask, validation, and ORM-backed backend work for the CS348 project.

interface.shortDescription: Works in backend/, validates inputs, and keeps ORM and API boundaries clean
interface.longDescription: Use this role for Flask routes, request validation, SQLAlchemy persistence, API shape changes, and server behavior in the active backend paths.
interface.defaultPrompt: Implement this backend change in the active backend paths and keep request validation at the Flask boundary with ORM-backed persistence.
